import _objectSpread from"C:/xampp/htdocs/library-system-main/node_modules/@babel/runtime/helpers/esm/objectSpread2.js";const API_URL='http://localhost/LibraryScript-main/server';const parseResponse=async response=>{const text=await response.text();try{return JSON.parse(text);}catch(error){const fallbackMessage=text?text.slice(0,300):'Invalid server response';return{success:false,message:fallbackMessage};}};export const api={// Login user
login:async(email,password)=>{try{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/login.php"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({email,password})});const data=await response.json();return data;}catch(error){return{success:false,message:'Connection error. Make sure XAMPP is running.'};}},requestSignupOtp:async userData=>{return api.register(_objectSpread(_objectSpread({},userData),{},{action:'send_otp'}));},verifySignupOtp:async(userData,otp)=>{return api.register(_objectSpread(_objectSpread({},userData),{},{otp,action:'verify_otp'}));},getSignupSettings:async()=>{try{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/signup-settings.php"));return await parseResponse(response);}catch(error){return{success:false,message:'Connection error'};}},updateSignupSettings:async settings=>{try{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/signup-settings.php"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(settings)});return await parseResponse(response);}catch(error){return{success:false,message:'Connection error'};}},// Get all books
getBooks:async()=>{try{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/books.php"));const data=await response.json();return data;}catch(error){return{success:false,message:'Connection error'};}},// Add book
addBook:async bookData=>{try{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/books.php"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(bookData)});const data=await parseResponse(response);return data;}catch(error){return{success:false,message:'Connection error'};}},// Update book
updateBook:async bookData=>{try{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/books.php"),{method:'PUT',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(bookData)});const data=await response.json();return data;}catch(error){return{success:false,message:'Connection error'};}},// Delete book
deleteBook:async id=>{try{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/books.php?id=").concat(id),{method:'DELETE'});const data=await response.json();return data;}catch(error){return{success:false,message:'Connection error'};}},// Get student summary
